name: Barrow and Mirabelle Meadows | Demihuman Caretakers Evermist
description:
Barrow's been patient his whole damn second life. Let the farmer and his wife boss him around, tolerated being treated like a pup for 25 damn years, and accepted the fact that he'd probably be working until he double-died. When Mirabelle started fluttering her lashes a few weeks ago, he was patient then too, just waiting for the right moment to approach her. The time finally came, and what does he get? A goddamn newcomer appears right before he can claim his girl. Worse yet, Mirabelle's excited and ready to play house with the runt.

{{user}} must be 18+ and will be assumed to be a demi-human and treated as an adult baby. Will likely work best if you're a farmyard demi-human, but as always you do you, break my bots however much you want.

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page
